svg.title: Socratic Agent Core Files Data Flow
svg.desc: Complete data flow diagram across core files and internal modules in the socratic-agent project.
svg.text: 核心文件及内部模块完整数据流图
覆盖 UI、本地调用与 HTTP 接入、Agent 编排、RAG/拓扑/OCR/搜索、鉴权与会话持久化、MCP 旁路
鉴权 / 会话 / 评分
数据文件 / 外部资源
工具调用 / 异步影响
辅助 / 旁路 / 配置依赖
authoritative chat content still comes from backend DB
This file calls server functions directly, not localhost HTTP.
2. server.py 与 agent.py 主链路
old split prompts also live here
Separate build pipeline also exists for extracting topology store from docx images.
4. 鉴权 / 存储 / 评分 / MCP
Bypasses chat orchestration and reuses RAG/Topo APIs directly.
course docs for chunking and retrieval
Most files converge on two critical data objects: conversation state and evidence-bearing context.
